page_subtitle: Versioned variables and secrets for flows and integrations
info_banner: Secrets are encrypted at rest. A private secret is resolved only by its creator at run time; a shared secret is available to any flow executor in the company.

help.overview: Company variables are available in all flows via @var:key. Flow variables are defined in the editor and override company values when keys match.

secrets.plain: Value is visible in API list and UI.
secrets.private: Only the creator can resolve the secret when starting a flow.
secrets.shared: Any flow executor in the company can use the secret.
secrets.masked: Secret values are not returned in list/get — only masked.

scopes.intro: Scope rules override the value for a specific context (namespace, user, channel, or another variable).
scopes.namespace: Example: namespace=sales → different value for the sales team.
scopes.var: Example: var order_mode=premium → depends on another variable.

help.expressions: Expressions support @var: and @ctx: references. The engine topologically sorts dependencies; cycles raise an error.
help.public_a2a: Public variables appear in the agent-card and are exposed to external A2A clients as type references.
help.versioning: Each save creates a new version. History is available in the drawer.

editor.secret_policy_private_hint: Only the creator resolves at run time.
editor.secret_policy_shared_hint: Any flow executor in the company.

system_variables.title: System variables
system_variables.hint: Resolved by the engine at run time, not stored in secrets.
